fieldValues.value: Six-month pilot, June to December 2026. At the end of that period the group meets to decide what comes next: continue, extend, change scope, or close.
A defined lifespan makes the review real rather than optional. Open-ended pilots drift without a moment of explicit recommitment.
Open-ended pilot with no fixed review date — judged too likely to drift.
December 2026. The review meeting produces a new decision that either supersedes this one or records closure.
